name: Crazy Drone Pizza Delivery
description: Crazy Drone Pizza Delivery is a fast-paced casual delivery game where you control a pizza drone racing through busy city skies. Fly carefully, avoid buildings, wires, and moving obstacles while delivering hot pizzas on time. Enjoy smooth one-hand controls, quick missions, and endless arcade fun. Upgrade your drone’s speed, stability, and cargo capacity to handle tougher routes. Complete daily challenges, earn rewards, unlock new drone skins, and compete on leaderboards. Easy to play, exciting to master—perfect for short breaks or long play sessions.
instructions: Use WASD keys to control the Drone
